top_signals.title: Stocks Join Bonds Higher as US-Iran Deal Sinks Oil: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks climbed around the world, joining gains in bonds as oil slumped after the US and Iran agreed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, fueling hopes for an end to the conflict that has roiled markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Euro Area Is Seeing Ratings Increasingly Converge, Scope Says
top_signals.summary: The euro area is experiencing a phase of convergence across the spectrum of national credit scores despite wildly varying underlying dynamics, Scope Ratings said.

top_signals.title: SpaceX shares gain for second day after blockbuster debut

top_signals.title: SpaceX gains 6% as it begins first full day of trading after record debut

top_signals.title: Manchester United bank eight-figure fee from Amazon All Or Nothing deal
top_signals.summary: Manchester United will receive an eight-figure fee after agreeing to feature in the next edition of Amazon Prime Video’s All Or Nothing documentary series. The show will follow the club’s fortunes over the next year, with shooting set to begin in pre-season and the series due to air in summer 2027. United follow Premier League [...]
